embed.title: !area
embed.description: Manage which geofence areas you receive alerts for. Areas are shapes your admin has configured — neighbourhoods, zones, routes.

fields.name: View
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}area list` — list every area configured by the admin that you're allowed to use
`{{prefix}}area` — show your currently selected areas

fields.name: Add and remove
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}area add north_london` — receive alerts from this area
`{{prefix}}area add north south east` — add multiple
`{{prefix}}area remove north`
`{{prefix}}area clear` — remove all your areas

fields.name: Interaction with `d:` (distance)
fields.value: If your tracking rule has `d:<metres>` set, it uses your `{{prefix}}location` + distance circle instead of areas. If your rule has no `d:` filter, it uses your selected areas.

fields.name: Related
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}location` — set a point for distance-based tracking
`{{prefix}}community` — area-security community membership
